author: YourName
install_msg: Thanks for installing MarketTrade. Use [p]market commands to manage assets and trading.
name: MarketTrade
short: Fake coin/stock trading game using bank credits
description: A Red Discord bot cog with fake crypto/stock assets, automatic price changes, and buy/sell trading with Red bank credits.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores fake asset prices and member holdings per guild.
